intro: Lycoctonum pseudolaeve, also known as Chinese snake root or pseudo-Laeve, is a type of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia.
